productDisplayName: Warner Bros Kids Unisex TJ Beach Slipper Red Slippers
description: Be it the beach or playing in water, you can forget your cares of your little one slipping and falling down with this pair of TJ Beach slippers from Warner Brothers. With a grippy outsole and a cartoon embossed upper strap, it's pure water fun for your little one. Upper Soft PU midfoot strap with Tom and Jerry cartoon print embossed on it Ridged PU footbed, ergonomically curved and grooved to offer exemplary support in wet conditions Outsole TPU outsole with grooves and circular lugs for absolute grip Care Wash under cool, running water Do not store in direct sunlight
